sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64999" key="maraugi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰραυγ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64999.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dazzling of the eyes</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archyt.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.196</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n64999.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαραύγεια</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰραυγ-αυγεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a fish, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
